args: SECRETS_DIR="${CODEX_SECRETS_DIR:-${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/secrets}"; SECRET_FILE="$SECRETS_DIR/paper-search-mcp.env"; if [ ! -f "$SECRET_FILE" ]; then echo "Missing CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/paper-search-mcp.env" >&2; exit 1; fi; set -a; source "$SECRET_FILE"; set +a; PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ROOT="${PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ROOT:-${CODEX_PROJECTS_ROOT:-$HOME/codes}/paper-search-mcp}"; if [ ! -d "$PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ROOT/paper_search_mcp" ]; then echo "Set PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ROOT to the local paper-search-mcp checkout" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec uv run --directory "$PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ROOT" --python 3.12 -m paper_search_mcp.server

SECRETS_DIR="${CODEX_SECRETS_DIR:-${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/secrets}"; SECRET_FILE="$SECRETS_DIR/zotero.env"; if [ ! -f "$SECRET_FILE" ]; then echo "Missing CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/zotero.env" >&2; exit 1; fi; set -a; source "$SECRET_FILE"; set +a; ZOTERO_MCP="$(command -v zotero-mcp || true)"; if [ -z "$ZOTERO_MCP" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/zotero-mcp" ]; then ZOTERO_MCP="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/zotero-mcp"; fi; if [ -z "$ZOTERO_MCP" ]; then echo "zotero-mcp not found" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$ZOTERO_MCP" serve --transport stdio
